message:
refactor(web): update NTM page to session manager UI (linter)

NTM page rewritten to show NTM-tracked agent sessions, system health,
and tool diagnostics instead of notification management. Uses existing
/system/snapshot and /health/detailed endpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
